theme: the dev/demo convergence — dev stacks become first-class peers (a unified first-available-N stack registry, a local per-stack Directus + auto-snapshot + light dev-min seed on build), one generic stack-* skill set (hard-renamed, no aliases), and a code-cited safety & security doc + a dual-repo KB refresh

stack_seeding.note: 232(test-only 231) -> 236 (+5 test funcs across v1.3: M13 dev-min preset pin +1, M15 write-side safety.md<->code drift guards +4)

aggregate.delta_go: +20 test funcs (stack-snapshot +15, stack-seeding +5; alignment + clerkenstein unchanged). No regression. (v1.2's headline 708 included 15 Fuzz funcs; the apples-to-apples test-only baseline is 693.)
aggregate.python_note: M12 NET-NEW the unified-registry suite — test_stack_registry.py 0 -> 50, +52 net new Python test funcs across M12 (stack-core 54 incl gen_override; dev-stack/demo-stack +1 each for the ERR-trap-frees path). M13 grew dev-stack to 38. M14/M15 touched no Python production surface.

test_health.race: all 4 Go modules pass go test ./... -race -count=1 (exit 0)
test_health.flake_gate: 0 flakes across every v1.3 milestone (M12 5/5 pytest; M13 5/5 Go -shuffle + 5x pytest; M14 5/5; M15 5/5 on both touched packages). Release-level: full -race suite clean.

coverage_snapshot.cmd_provision_plan: 93% statements (M13 — run() + checkEnvContract 100%; residual = os.Exit shim + an invariant-pinned defensive branch)
coverage_snapshot.drift_guards: M15 — every load-bearing safety.md claim (read-side predicates + AssertPlan/AssertCaptured + bounded read-only SQL; write-side rejection-lists + CheckWrite/PreflightEnv/AssertClean + forced bucket override) pinned by a fail-closed test, mutation-proven at close
coverage_snapshot.regression_vs_v1_2: no logic-coverage regression — v1.3 added new pinned surfaces (registry, runner, drift guards); the unchanged Go modules (alignment, clerkenstein) are byte-identical

release_gates.unified_registry: one shared N-pool across dev+demo; first-available-N allocator (fcntl.flock + atomic write + docker-ps adds-only reconcile); OS-process race verified (12-process auto + 6-process explicit-N collision)
release_gates.dev_as_peer: dev-stack up gets the demo treatment by default — per-stack Directus (provision-plan runner) + cache-first stacksnap replay of public taxonomy+directus + dev-min light seed; capture NEVER run on dev (replay only); media refs-only; n=0-dev guard doubled
release_gates.unified_skills: dev-up/dev-down + stack-list/stack-seed/stack-snapshot/stack-update (hard rename, no aliases); 6 old dirs removed; CLAUDE.md 14-skill bijection; rename invariant 0 live stragglers (guarded by TestDocSourceSkillRename_M14)
release_gates.safety_contract: corpus/ops/safety.md (code-cited) — read-side (never reads private data) + write-side (never touches prod); every load-bearing claim pinned to firewall.go/isolation.go/audit.go/source.go by a fail-closed drift guard (mutation-proven)
release_gates.prod_isolation: the 3-layer guard (CheckWrite/PreflightEnv/AssertClean) + tenant firewall (AssertPlan/AssertCaptured) + public predicates intact across the converged dev+demo path; audit-proven zero pollution
release_gates.data_dna_coverage: 100% over the full catalog (inherited from v1.2; unchanged)
release_gates.alignment_gates: 100%/100% on all 4 Clerkenstein surfaces (Go 22/22 · JS 9/9 · express 9/9 · deploy 7/7) — held green, v1.3 touched no clerkenstein

supply_chain.audit: govulncheck (installed for this phase) + go vet (clean) + license scan
supply_chain.stdlib_called_vulns: alignment 0; clerkenstein/stack-snapshot/stack-seeding 12/12/12 — ALL Go stdlib at @go1.25.3 (local dev toolchain: crypto/x509, crypto/tls, net, net/url, net/http, net/textproto, os), cleared by building with the go1.25.11+ toolchain (highest fixed-in: crypto/x509@go1.25.11). Same class + remediation as v1.2.
supply_chain.non_called_third_party_vulns: found in imported/required modules but not reachable from called code (govulncheck symbol analysis): not a shipped risk
supply_chain.licenses: all permissive — MIT / BSD-3 / ISC / Apache-2.0 (pgx, testify, yaml.v3, go-jose, clerk-sdk-go, svix-webhooks, google/uuid, golang.org/x/*); NO GPL/AGPL/LGPL
supply_chain.lockfile: dependencies.lock (20 external modules across 4 Go modules)

repos.rosetta: the corpus + plan + Claude skills (public). v1.3 diff: the skill hard-rename (.claude/skills/), the new corpus/ops/safety.md + corpus doc refresh, CLAUDE.md/README, plan records. ZERO tracked .go files.
repos.rosetta_extensions: the private monorepo — 4 Go modules (clerkenstein, alignment, stack-snapshot, stack-seeding) + the Python/bash stack tooling (stack-core registry, dev-stack/demo-stack CLIs). v1.3 delta: stack-snapshot-m11..HEAD = 22 files, +2386/-52, 23 commits. Tags stack-party-m12..m15.

inherited_to_v1_4: DEF-M10-01 — Directus S3 media blob bytes + cloud SnapshotStore backend (built + unit-tested, unreachable from any entrypoint, gated on S3-read access; signed v1.2 escape-hatch, re-scoped v1.3->v1.4 by user 2026-06-07; NOT aged out — all 4 aging triggers negative)

verdict: GREEN — Go test funcs +20 (no decrease; 693->713 test-only matcher) + 52 net-new Python (the unified registry); coverage flat/up on continuing logic packages; flake 0; -race/gofmt/vet/shellcheck/py_compile clean; 0 called third-party CVEs (the 12 called vulns are Go stdlib @go1.25.3, cleared by go1.25.11+ toolchain — same as v1.2); all-permissive licenses; 0 new deferrals (only the inherited signed DEF-M10-01 -> v1.4).
